auth.errors.accountLocked: Account is temporarily locked due to too many failed login attempts
auth.errors.failedToGenerateResetToken: Failed to generate password reset token
auth.errors.passwordResetNotAvailableFor: Password reset is not available for OAuth accounts
auth.errors.twoFactorNotSetup: Two-factor authentication is not set up
auth.googleCallback.title: Completing Sign In
auth.landing.benefits.subtitle: A reliable platform designed to support the full election process with secure voting options, real-time collaboration among tellers, and transparent tallying.
auth.landing.benefits.title: Election Management for Bahá'í Communities
auth.landing.cta.description: Choose your role above to log in and begin supporting your community's election.
auth.landing.cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
auth.landing.description: TallyJ is a secure and easy-to-use election management system built specifically for Bahá'í communities. It provides a complete platform to manage elections, people, ballots, and real-time tallying.
auth.landing.features.accessible.descrip: Clear and intuitive interface that works for all skill levels. Guided steps make election management straightforward.
auth.landing.features.accessible.title: Easy to Use
auth.landing.features.flexible.descripti: Supports in-person ballots, mailed or dropped-off ballots, online voting, and delegate elections. You can configure the process to fit your community's needs.
auth.landing.features.flexible.title: Flexible Voting Options
auth.landing.features.multilingual.descr: The interface is available in multiple languages to serve Bahá'í communities around the world.
auth.landing.features.multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
auth.landing.features.realtime.descripti: Multiple tellers can work together at the same time. Live updates show ballot processing status instantly across all devices.
auth.landing.features.realtime.title: Real-Time Collaboration
auth.landing.features.secure.description: Built with strong security practices. Election data is encrypted, backed up, and protected with multi-factor authentication.
auth.landing.features.secure.title: Secure & Reliable
auth.landing.features.transparent.descri: Complete audit trail with detailed logs. Real-time results and clear reports help ensure accountability.
auth.landing.features.transparent.title: Transparent Tallying
auth.landing.optionExternalDesc: Access the specialized system for officer elections.
auth.landing.optionOfficerDesc: Create and manage elections, update voter information, and coordinate ballot processing. For head tellers and convenors.
auth.landing.optionTellerDesc: Join the team of tellers to help process ballots during the election.
auth.landing.optionVoterDesc: Vote in your community’s election using your email or phone number.
auth.landing.title: Welcome to TallyJ
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.passwordMinLength12: Password must be at least 12 characters
auth.passwordRequireDigit: Password must contain at least one number
auth.passwordRequireLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
auth.passwordRequireSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
auth.passwordRequireUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
auth.tellerJoin.description: Select an election and enter the access code to join as an assistant teller
auth.tellerJoin.noElections: No elections are currently open for tellers
auth.tellerJoin.title: Join Election as Teller
auth.tellerLogin.title: Assistant Teller
auth.voterAuth.title: Voter Authentication
auth.voterBallot.title: Cast Your Ballot
auth.voterConfirmation.title: Vote Confirmed

auth.voterLogin.title: Voter
